title: erigeron bellidiastrum
intro: Erigeron bellidiastrum, also known as dandelion's cousin or Russian dandelion, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae), characterized by its yellow flowers and edible greens. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic, reduce inflammation, and stimulate the immune system. The health benefits of Erigeron bellidiastrum include its potential to treat digestive issues, such as constipation and bloating, and its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Erigeron bellidiastrum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
